reviews.review_title: Don’t let your kid get this
reviews.review_description: I wanted to try Gorilla tag modded games and I found this one. I thought it would be like all the modded gorilla tag games but when I joined, there were a bunch of Nazi logos and I had to delete it immediately. I am ten bro. Don’t make kids get a heart attack.

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: Hi! I wad literally on the game for not even 5 minutes and i was falsely banned for 2 days. Get better moderators. Im never playing this again! Please consider this if you want to download this. 🤜

I got banned 4 minutes in. I was playing like normal, untill it happened. I got banned for 2 days for no reason. And its just a copy of gorilla tag. Think of a better idea than just a gorilla tag copy. There are too many of them already. The movements are wacky, its almost impossible to join codes, and the game os overall horrible. 1 star.

reviews.review_title: I lowkey had a heart attack
reviews.review_description: This game was good before they shutdown but when I loaded in there was nazi images so that's why I'm rating this game 1 star
Me personal, I think the game is sigma

It NEEDS an update it’s winter (in the game) and I just got the game and I got gt2 badge and the front page doesn’t look convincing to play but the game is AMAZING but OWNER if you are reading this here’s some advice   

1. update the game to date, the cosmetics, move stuff around like the computer￼￼ (right now it’s May 25 2025.)￼￼￼


2. The front page didn’t convince me to play, but I clicked on it because it looked like it might’ve been a bad game  
but in reality it was a really good game so just change the front page.                                                                                    

Can you also add a mod game mode but make it so people CANT use the mod in NORMAL infection or casual and guardian….can you add the bark Christmas menu PLEASE

Other than that AMAZING GAME LOVE IT!!!!!

Don’t get me wrong it’s really fun but there’s one thing that keeps me from playing it cosmetics when I play gorilla tag fan games I like to get all the cosmetics i put on the glasses I can’t see anything and I can’t play the game anymore
Amazing game! The community is amazing and  owners too! I recommend playing this game!!
